summary: A blues‑heavy show with a solid setlist, but the tape drops in quality at the beginning and the encore's end.
review: The performance is described as "very bluesy" with a "sick" set list that makes it worth listening to. The recording holds up for most of the concert, though reviewers note noticeable shortcomings at the start and during the final moments of the encore. Overall it’s an enjoyable listen despite those technical hiccups.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderate‑rated review; the show is praised while the recording has specific flaws, leading to an average combined score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Good for most of the concert but suffers at the very beginning and the end of the encore; no mention of soundboard or audience source.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Blues‑heavy, "sick" set list that keeps interest high despite some recording issues.
